title: CHILD ADVOCACY CENTER - 211info
text: AMANI CENTER CHILD ADVOCACY CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assessments, support services, medical evaluations, and forensic evaluations for suspected child abuse victims. Also provides on-site and off-site therapy and counseling referrals, safety planning, advocacy services, and community training. Eligibility: Children ages 0-18 who are affected by physical or sexual abuse, at risk of being abused, or have directly experienced abuse. Families of these individuals are also eligible. Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (503) 366-4005 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 366-4005 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information, most services require a referral from ODHS or law enforcement FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Columbia County Services: Case/Care Management * At Risk Families Child Abuse Counseling Child Abuse Medical Evaluations Child Abuse Prevention Child Advocacy Centers Therapy Referrals * Child Abuse Issues If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
